name: Crispy Fried Fennel in Light Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 large fennel bulb (about 1 1/2 pounds), trimmed and sliced lengthwise 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, bring water to a boil. Quickly blanch the fennel for 3 minutes. Remove from water and drain on paper towels.
2. In a small pot, combine tomato paste, 1 tablespoon olive oil, crushed fennel seed, and water. Whisk to incorporate. Bring to a boil and simmer over medium heat for 3 minutes.
3. In a bowl, mix flour and Creole spice recipe.
4. In a large saute pan, heat remaining 7 tablespoons of olive oil. Dredge the fennel in the flour mixture, shaking off excess. Saute until edges turn golden, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Turn off heat. Continue cooking for 3-4 minutes. Pour simmering sauce over the fennel and cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
